_meta.description: Historical penalty scoring probability by goal zone, used to shade the shootout net visual. Goal split into a 3-column x 2-row grid (columns left/centre/right from the shooter's view; rows top/low). 'conversion' = share of penalties aimed at that zone that are scored; 'share' = share of all penalties aimed there. Values are representative figures consistent with published penalty analytics (analyses of several thousand professional penalties); approximate, for visualization only.
_meta.source: Aggregated public penalty-analytics summaries (e.g. large-sample studies of professional penalties)
